summary: Completed testing of Customer Portal redesign. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All sections working - Hero, Services (5 ISO certs), Order Tracking, RFQ Form, FAQ Accordion, Contact Form. Login page Customer Portal link working.

console_warnings.message: Failed to load resource: 404 - likely bayan-logo.png image
console_warnings.note: Logo image may be missing but page renders correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Customer Portal is fully redesigned with professional UI
All 5 ISO certification services displayed correctly (9001, 14001, 45001, 22000, 27001)
Order tracking search works - shows error message for non-existent tracking IDs
RFQ form submits successfully to /api/public/rfq endpoint
Contact form submits successfully to /api/public/contact endpoint
FAQ accordion functionality working properly with 6 questions
Login page has Customer Portal link card that navigates to /portal
Bilingual support (EN/AR) working - language switcher toggles between Arabic and English

test_credentials.note: Customer portal is public - no authentication required

seed_data: N/A - public endpoints tested with dynamic test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Portal (/portal) fully tested. Hero section with stats bar, 5 ISO services, Order Tracking, RFQ Form, FAQ Accordion, Contact Form all working. Login page (/login) has Customer Portal link. Bilingual EN/AR support working. Backend APIs: POST /api/public/rfq, POST /api/public/contact, GET /api/public/track/{id} all verified.

endpoints_verified.POST /api/public/rfq: WORKING - Creates RFQ request with company_name, contact_name, email, phone, standards[], message
endpoints_verified.POST /api/public/contact: WORKING - Creates contact message with name, email, subject, message
endpoints_verified.GET /api/public/track/{id}: WORKING - Returns 404 for non-existent tracking IDs (expected behavior)

frontend_verified.Customer Portal Hero: WORKING - Title, subtitle, CTA buttons (Request Quote, Track Order), stats bar (500+ companies, 15+ years, 50+ auditors, 99% satisfaction)
frontend_verified.Services Section: WORKING - All 5 ISO certifications displayed with icons and descriptions
frontend_verified.Order Tracking: WORKING - Input field, search button, error message display for invalid IDs
frontend_verified.RFQ Form: WORKING - Company name, contact name, email, phone, employees, sites, standards checkboxes, message, submit button
frontend_verified.FAQ Accordion: WORKING - 6 FAQ items with collapsible answers
frontend_verified.Contact Form: WORKING - Name, email, subject, message fields with submit button
frontend_verified.Footer: WORKING - Quick links, certifications list, copyright
frontend_verified.Login Page Portal Link: WORKING - Card with globe icon navigates to /portal
frontend_verified.Language Switcher: WORKING - Toggles between Arabic and English

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
